scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @odin-pulse/shared build && concurrently -k -n web,api -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @odin-pulse/web dev" "pnpm --filter @odin-pulse/api dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @odin-pulse/shared build && pnpm --filter @odin-pulse/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @odin-pulse/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @odin-pulse/web typecheck
